title: claude-weeek per-repo configuration
description: Drives skill and hook behaviour for the claude-weeek Claude Code plugin. All fields are optional. Place this file at the root of any repo that should override the plugin's built-in defaults.

taskIdPatterns.description: Regex patterns (as strings) used to extract a numeric WEEEK task ID from branch names and commit messages. The first pattern that matches wins. Capture group 1 must contain the numeric ID. When set, this REPLACES the plugin's built-in defaults — it does not extend them.

branchTemplate.description: Branch name template used by the weeek-start skill. Placeholders: {id} = numeric task ID, {slug} = lowercase kebab-cased title.

defaultBoardId.description: Optional default board ID. Skills use this when a task does not have a boardId or when the user invokes a skill that operates on the active board.

defaultProjectId.description: Optional default project ID. Skills like weeek-today scope queries to this project when set.

statusHints.description: Maps workflow stage names to lists of column-name candidates that match. Skills compare against these case-insensitively. All sub-fields optional. Multi-stage workflows (In Progress → Review → Testing → Done) are first-class — populate review/testing only if your boards use those stages.
